## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and next steps for February.](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [19 articles published, 10 indexed; 8 ready to publish, 8 ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Early performance metrics show 656 impressions and 6 clicks, mostly from old content](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [February focus: text services content, industry-focused articles, and SOP cluster](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [New practices: weekly performance tracking in Airtable, strategic interlinking for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Publishing Process

  - [19 articles published, 10 indexed in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [8 articles ready to publish, 8 ready for review (5 continuous, 3 refresh)](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Publishing process: Sadira edits and uploads to CMS, Jessica reviews and publishes](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Yourco team retains publishing rights for security reasons](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### Performance Metrics and Early Results

  - [656 impressions and 6 clicks total, mostly from old content](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [30% increase in impressions and clicks since new website launch](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Slow start is normal; expected to ramp up with current strategy](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### February Content Strategy

  - [Focus on text services content due to successful Bing SEM campaign](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Prioritize industry-focused articles (e.g., manufacturing, lean manufacturing)](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Continue with SOP cluster](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Create new comparison content for text services (similar to engagement tools article)](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### New Practices and Improvements

  - [Weekly performance tracking in Airtable (clicks, impressions, keywords, rankings)](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Strategic interlinking: linking new articles from best-performing old articles](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Aim to speed up indexing and improve topical relevance](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [Content refresh articles moved to "Assignments" tab under "Refresh" category](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Team to investigate blank document issue for "Texting vs Email in the Workplace" article](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Focus on text services, industry-focused, and SOP content for February](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Implement new performance tracking and interlinking practices](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve blank document issue in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Explore high-volume keyword opportunities to support medium/low-volume strategy](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Continue monitoring indexing progress for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/J5ZQ_JUf6SaxsbdsJB_wTWtZzsmimUP-?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
